channel.title: Feng Shui Basics on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom
channel.description: Recent content in Feng Shui Basics on Feng Shui Guide - Your Complete Resource for Chinese Wisdom

item.title: Chi Energy: Understanding the Life Force in Feng Shui
item.description: Learn about Chi (Qi) energy, the fundamental life force in Feng Shui. Discover how to cultivate positive Chi, remove energy blocks, and enhance the flow of vital energy in your home.

item.title: The Bagua Map: Your Complete Guide to Feng Shui Energy Mapping
item.description: Learn how to use the Bagua map in Feng Shui to analyze and enhance different areas of your home. Discover the nine zones and their meanings for wealth, relationships, career, and more.

item.title: The Five Elements Theory: A Complete Guide to Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water
item.description: Learn about the Five Elements (Wu Xing) in Feng Shui: Wood, Fire, Earth, Metal, and Water. Discover their meanings, relationships, and how to balance them in your home.

item.title: What is Feng Shui? A Complete Beginner's Guide
item.description: Discover what Feng Shui is, its 3,000-year history, core principles, and how you can apply this ancient Chinese practice to create harmony in your modern life.

item.title: Yin and Yang: Understanding the Balance of Opposites in Feng Shui
item.description: Learn about Yin and Yang, the fundamental concept of duality and balance in Feng Shui. Discover how to create harmony by balancing these opposing forces in your home.
